free_text: A systematic study of (n,p) reactions at 14.7 MeV
Institut fuer Chemie of the Kernforschungs-
Anlage,Juelich.
Final data set
- prelim. data at 14.7 MeV
Neutron generator  DYNAGEN for
the 14.7 MeV data.
For the 14.7 MeV data.
Flux density was (1-3) x 10**9 neutr./cm**2/sec
No fast pneumatic system used (comment
from Prof. S.M.Qaim)
For the reactions 49Ti(n,p)49Sc, 63Cu(n,p)63Ni,
beta-counting were performed.
Modern methods of chemical separation were
employed, wherever necessary- Cu-63(n,p), I-127((n,p).
Gamma-and X-ray-spectroscopy were employed.
Gamma-gamma coincidence.
Co-axial 28 cm**3 GeLi detector in case of
very low energy gamma-rays, or Ge detector of active
area 2 cm**2 with thin beryllium window.
A low-background anticoincidence beta-
proportional counter.
Data
analysis method.
Error
estimation and correction method.
See for
method of corrections.
Data for
nuclear reactions induced by fast neutrons produced
in the break-up 30 MeV deuterons on beryllium
For all reactions, except-
for 56Fe(n,2n)55Fe, 58Ni(n,alpha)55Fe and
for 49Ti(n,p)49Sc, 63Cu(n,p)63Ni.
-The systematics of the cross sections were discussed
in comparison with data from other authors.
-Cross section data taken from Conference
Proceedings, and from Reference NP/A,283,269.
Usual corrections for:
- Decay,
- Gamma-transition intensities,
- Internal conversion coefficients,
- Counting efficiency,
- Geometry,
- Absorption.
No description of the error sources
Updated with Ref. NP/A,283,269.
Adding MONITOR data to resp. Subents and
adding modifier SPA to resp. REACTION strings.
REACTION strings for n,np-reactions
corrected to include also n,d-contribution.
N.Ch
M.M. BIB information was added.
Free text was corrected to be "human-readable".
REACTION of Subent 085 was corrected.
Dates were corrected for 4-digits year.
M.M. BIB information added from 76GARMISH.
Reference 76GARMISH was checked, it was found, that
Subents 20,22,26,27,29,30,33, 40-48 had been deleted
in Master files of NDS and NNDC without any
explanations in HISTORY.  Subent 020 (Fe-56(n,p)
from NP/A,283) was moved into Subent 094.
Data from Table 2 of 76GARMISH are restored in Subents
initially and according to NEADB archive file).
SD: In REACTION code "-G" was deleted from
Sc-46 (Sbnt 5), Sc-50 (Sbnt 9), Co-60 (Sbnt 32),
Ge-75 (Sbnt 65), Rb-86 (Sbnt 75), Re-188 (Sbnt 80),
Os-191 (Sbnt 82) according to remarks from author
(Prof. S.M.Qaim). Title was changed according to
the article.
030, 033, 040 - 048 were moved from this Entry to new
one (see 23277) - another experiment.
SAMPLE moved to Subents 2-94. MONIT1, MONIT2 from
Subents 2-94 were moved to Subent 001. DECAY-MON was
added in Subent 001. Subent 095 was added.
SD: Subent 036 deleted (duplication with
Subent 054).
M.M. COMMON block and BIB ( Subent 001 )
information were restored from trans.2243.
Subent 094 was corrected.
Subent 096 was added.
Targets materials were sealed in polyethylene bags,
sandwiched between two layers of flux monitor
material of Al or As2-O3.
